name: @softwaretechnik/dbml-renderer
when_to_use: 把一段 DBML(简洁的数据库 schema DSL)文本编译成布局好的 ER 图 SVG 时用它,尤其当 schema 是文本生成/编写的场景——原生在多表布局、typed 列、PK/FK 标记与关系基数自动布线上失败。它是静态-从文本这条路;要可编辑画布用搭档 @dineug/erd-editor。
why_valuable: 多表 ER 图需要图布局 + 一致的表渲染 + FK 自动布线;AI 手绘 ERD 会出现关系交叉/重叠、表框不一致、无法自动路由 FK。dbml-renderer 用 graphviz(viz.js WASM)把 DBML 确定性布局成 ER 图 SVG。

data_in.note: dbml 是 DBML 语言:`Table 名 { 列 类型 [pk] }` 定义表与列(列设置 [pk]/[not null]/[unique]/[ref: > other.col]),`Ref: A.col > B.col` 定义关系(> 多对一、- 一对一、<> 多对多)。run 同步返回 SVG 字符串;引擎是 graphviz-wasm,需宿主允许 WebAssembly。

schema.dbml: string —— DBML 源文本;语法错误 run 抛错
schema.format?: 'svg' | 'dot' —— 默认 'svg';'dot' 返回 graphviz DOT 文本而非 SVG

spec.note: graphviz 布局 SVG 自带 intrinsic viewBox,随表数增长;承载区给显式 400px 高并滚动,仅把 svg.style.maxWidth 设 100%,禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

en.when_to_use: Use it to compile DBML text (a concise database schema DSL) into a laid-out ER diagram SVG, especially when the schema is generated or authored as text. Native work fails at multi-table layout, typed columns, PK/FK markers, and automatically routed relationship cardinalities. This is the static-from-text path; for an editable canvas, use the companion @dineug/erd-editor.
en.why_valuable: A multi-table ER diagram needs graph layout, consistent table rendering, and automatic FK routing. AI-drawn ERDs produce crossing/overlapping relationships, inconsistent table boxes, and no automatic FK routes. dbml-renderer uses graphviz (viz.js WASM) to lay DBML out deterministically as ER-diagram SVG.

data_in.note: dbml is the DBML language: `Table name { column type [pk] }` defines tables and columns (columns may use [pk]/[not null]/[unique]/[ref: > other.col]), while `Ref: A.col > B.col` defines relationships (> many-to-one, - one-to-one, <> many-to-many). run synchronously returns an SVG string. The engine is graphviz-wasm, so the host must allow WebAssembly.

schema.dbml: string -- DBML source text; run throws on syntax errors
schema.format?: 'svg' | 'dot' -- default 'svg'; 'dot' returns graphviz DOT text rather than SVG

spec.note: The graphviz-laid-out SVG has an intrinsic viewBox and grows with the number of tables. Give the carrier an explicit 400px height and scrolling; set only svg.style.maxWidth to 100%. Rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights.

example._why: DBML 简洁,minimal 给两表 + 一条 FK,展示 pk 与 Ref 基数。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:主线程 wasm(§CSP)理论可用,但 /sync 为 Node 目标构建 + graphviz-wasm 浏览器执行未实测,待 H0 wasm 探针
carriers.widget: conditional:宿主 CSP/能力必须允许 WebAssembly(wasm-unsafe-eval);run 生成的 SVG 可完全落 shadow
carriers.codex: conditional:sandbox 必须允许 WebAssembly 编译;+esm 依赖链(viz.js/sync 3.5MB)加载未实测

isolation.evidence: API verified vs @softwaretechnik/dbml-renderer@1.0.31: lib/api.d.ts `export declare const run: (input:string, format:Format) => string`;lib/renderer.d.ts `type Format = 'dot' | 'svg'`——schema dbml/format 精确消费,run 同步返回字符串。dbml-renderer 自身 +esm grep:0 document.head/body、0 Worker、0 appendChild(纯函数)。引擎:+esm `import*as ua from '/npm/@aduh95/viz.js@3.4.0/sync/+esm'`——graphviz 编译为 wasm。viz.js/sync grep:无 fetch(、无 instantiateStreaming,持 `wasmBinary` + `instantiate`→内联 wasm 字节实例化,不走网络(仅需 wasm-unsafe-eval 编译)。RISK:exports['./sync']=render_sync.cjs 为 Node 目标 emscripten 构建(内含 readFileSync fs shim),browser 字段只重映射主入口而非 /sync,经 jsDelivr +esm 在浏览器实际执行未实测。shadowCompatible=yes(输出 SVG 字符串写 shadow),全局副作用 no,唯一硬约束是 WebAssembly 能力。confidence=medium:API 确证,浏览器 wasm 执行未真机跑。
